name: Kung Pao Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breast into 3/4 inch cubes.
2. Combine with marinade ingredients in the order listed. Set aside to marinate.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a wok over high heat for about 1 minute. Add 2 cups of oil and heat to 300 degrees. Add chicken, stirring to separate pieces. Remove and drain.
4. Combine seasonings thoroughly and set aside.
5. Remove all but 2 tablespoons of oil from the wok. Reheat, swirling pan to coat sides. Add chili pods, breaking only one in half. Stir for about 45 seconds or until browned (but not burned).
6. Return chicken to the wok and cook for 1-2 minutes until browned.
7. Add vegetables and stir-fry for 1 minute.
8. Add seasonings, mixing thoroughly, and cook until thickened.
9. Sprinkle with sesame oil and hot chili oils, then finally with roasted peanuts before serving.
